title: refine:example-factorial

options.label: P1
options.author: gemma4:latest
options.text:
```scheme
(define (factorial n)
  (if (zero? n)
      1
      (* n (factorial (- n 1)))))

(factorial 5) ; evaluates to 120
```

options.label: P2
options.author: CURRENT
options.text:

options.label: P3
options.author: llama3:latest
options.text:
```
(define (factorial n)
  (cond ((zero? n) 1)
        ((= n 1) 1)
        (else (* n (factorial (- n 1))))))

(factorial 5)  ; evaluates to 120
```

options.label: P4
options.author: mistral:7b
options.text:
(define (factorial n)
  (if (< n 2)
      1
      (* n (factorial (- n 1))))

  ; Tail recursion for improved performance
  (define (tail-rec acc n)
    (if (zero? n)
        acc
        (tail-rec (+ (* n acc) 1) (- n 1))))

  (tail-rec 1 n))
